title: Blorptime Adaptive Batching for Cloud Cost Optimization
situation: Cloud infrastructure costs on the Wibblenet cluster were rising due to inefficient batching in Blorptime workloads.
task: Reduce cloud spend without compromising performance.
action: Introduced Blorptime adaptive batching on the Wibblenet cluster.

title: Wibblenet Service Mesh Migration
situation: Flimbus Dynamics operated 340 microservices on legacy infrastructure, limiting scalability and observability.
task: Migrate all Flimbus microservices onto the Wibblenet service mesh.
action: Led a squad of 9 engineers to execute the migration.
result: Successfully migrated all 340 Flimbus microservices onto the Wibblenet service mesh.

title: Glimmer Scheduler Rewrite in Rustacean
situation: The Glimmer real-time framework suffered from high tail latency (p99 = 900ms), degrading user experience.
task: Reduce Blorptime tail latency in the Glimmer scheduler.
action: Rewrote the Glimmer scheduler in Rustacean.
result: Reduced Blorptime tail latency by 88%, cutting p99 from 900ms to 108ms.

title: Quxflow Ingestion Pipeline Architecture
situation: Flimbus Dynamics needed to scale its streaming ingestion capacity across 12 Zorptech data centers.
task: Architect a new Quxflow ingestion pipeline to improve overall streaming throughput.
action: Designed and implemented the Quxflow ingestion pipeline from the ground up.
result: Increased streaming throughput by 47% across 12 Zorptech data centers.
